name: nova-retail-clickstream-pipeline
description: Streams clickstream events from Pub/Sub to Hive-partitioned Parquet in GCS

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.label: GCS output path
parameters.helpText: GCS prefix for Parquet output, e.g. gs://BUCKET/clickstream

parameters.name: dead_letter_path
parameters.label: GCS dead-letter path
parameters.helpText: GCS prefix for malformed/invalid records, e.g. gs://BUCKET/clickstream_dead_letter

parameters.name: window_size_minutes
parameters.label: Window size (minutes)
parameters.helpText: Size of the fixed window used to batch records into Parquet files
